critical.mandate: Fix all FAIL findings from the validation report
Preserve all existing valid content — only modify sections flagged as FAIL
Remove the old validation report after fixes are applied

step.title: Load Story
step.ask: Which story to fix? (provide story key, e.g., 1.2)
step.action: Find and read the story file matching {story_key}-*.md in {implementation_artifacts}/

step.title: Parse Validation Report
step.action: Locate the "## Validation Report" section at the end of the story file (after the --- separator)
Extract all FAIL findings with their section names and issue descriptions
step.check: If no validation report is found, HALT and instruct the user to run /kratos-validate-story first
If all sections are PASS, inform user the story has no issues to fix and STOP

step.title: Load Template Reference
step.action: Use the template as reference for expected structure and format of each section

step.title: Fix Flagged Issues
step.action: For each FAIL finding, fix the corresponding section: - Missing sections: add the section following the template structure - Incomplete metadata: fill in missing header fields (Epic, Sprint, Date, Author, Status, Traces to) - Unclear ACs: rewrite in Given/When/Then format, ensure each is testable - Unlinked subtasks: link each subtask to an AC number - Empty Test Scenarios: populate the test scenarios table - Missing DoD: add specific, measurable Definition of Done items - Other issues: address per the validation finding description
Preserve all existing valid content — do NOT rewrite sections that passed validation

step.title: Remove Validation Report
step.action: Remove the --- separator and the entire "## Validation Report" section from the end of the story

step.title: Save Corrected Story
step.action: Story status remains 'validating' — user must re-run /kratos-validate-story to promote to ready-for-dev
step.template-output: Save the corrected story file with all FAIL issues resolved and the old validation report removed. The story should now pass all validation checks. Inform the user to run /kratos-validate-story to validate and promote the story to ready-for-dev.

step.title: Update Sprint Status
step.action: Ensure the story entry status is set to 'validating'
step.template-output: Update sprint-status.yaml to confirm the story status is validating. User must run /kratos-validate-story to promote to ready-for-dev.
